title: Rainbow Jeb Wool
description: Allows you to name a wool item "jeb_" in an an anvil to make it change colors, similar to sheep.
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Similarly to sheep, this pack makes any wool item named ```jeb_``` cycle through all the wool colors. **This does NOT affect the placed block model, because it loses its name when placed down. It only affects the item dropped or in an inventory. Placing the item will result in it becoming a normal wool block of the color it was originally.** # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21.5-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any resource pack that uses the new item model feature, found in the ```assets/minecraft/items``` folder, to apply textures or models to any wool block, and any pack that uses the same block model or texture name (```minecraft/rainbow_wool```) ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
